text.div:
This code system http://fhir.infoway-inforoute.ca/io/psca/CodeSystem/ContentNotSupported defines the following codes:

CodeDisplay
not-supported The content is not currently supported by the producing system due to technical limitations and/or policy constraints

name: ContentNotSupportedCS
title: CodeSystem Content Not Supported (PS-CA)
description:
This codesystem defines concepts for content that is not supported by the supplying system.

Feedback is requested on use of this CodeSystem and the related mechanism of identifying the reason for absent content.

concept.display: The content is not currently supported by the producing system due to technical limitations and/or policy constraints
